title: viola × polysecta
intro: Viola × polysecta, also known as the hybrid violet or  common pansy, is a perennial plant with heart-shaped leaves and showy, fragrant flowers. This plant is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Viola × polysecta include relief from anxiety and insomnia, as well as the potential to lower blood sugar levels. Viola × polysecta can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is often used in traditional medicine to promote relaxation and well-being.
